name: design-md-from-screenshots
description: Reverse-engineer a product's visual design system from one or more website/app screenshots and produce a single authoritative DESIGN.md — a framework-agnostic, token-based spec (palette, typography, spacing, shape, motion, component inventory, voice, do/don't) with per-token provenance marks, so another AI (Stitch, Claude, v0, Cursor, AI Elements) can generate new screens that unmistakably belong to the same product.
